positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for pos
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u20,axiom,
    symptom_of(monkeypox,fever)).

cnf(u30,axiom,
    monkeypox_virus != monkeypox).

cnf(u23,axiom,
    symptom_of(monkeypox,tiredness)).

cnf(u25,axiom,
    headache != muscle_pain).

cnf(u22,axiom,
    symptom_of(monkeypox,muscle_pain)).

cnf(u24,axiom,
    muscle_pain != tiredness).

cnf(u27,axiom,
    fever != coughing).

cnf(u26,axiom,
    fever != headache).

cnf(u29,axiom,
    monkeypox != flu).

cnf(u28,axiom,
    flu != coughing).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    symptom_of(monkeypox,headache)).

cnf(u31,negated_conjecture,
    ~symptom_of(monkeypox,coughing)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define occurs(X0,X1) := $true
for all inputs,
    define may_get_monkeypox(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define animal(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define mammal(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define human(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define gets(X0,X1) := $true
for all inputs,
    define feels_tired(X0) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
